In-person startup work location not confirmed
improvement_bullets: Spearheaded inventory tracking and sales reporting automation by building Python scripts that ingested POS data, ensuring real-time visibility into stock levels and performance metrics.
Managed organizational workflows by designing standardized reporting templates in Excel and Google Sheets to support executive-level decision-making and operational tracking.
Operated as an independent self-starter to establish data governance frameworks, proactively identifying and resolving data discrepancies across cross-functional systems.
Utilized advanced Excel, including complex pivot tables and lookups, to build executive-facing dashboards that streamlined inventory tracking and consolidated business performance data.
Collaborated directly with leadership to transform raw operational data into actionable strategic insights, ensuring high attention to detail in all executive-level reports.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the MIS / Executive Operations Analyst (Part-Time) opportunity with Kneetoes. I am interested in this opportunity because of Kneetoes' rapid expansion into the U.S. market, which requires a sharp, data-driven approach to scale operations effectively. What interests me about working for Kneetoes is its focus on blending footwear and fashion innovation; the opportunity to help a growing startup refine its internal systems and data accuracy truly intrigues me. I believe my expertise in advanced Excel and Google Sheets, coupled with my experience in data-driven operational optimization, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by building automated systems to replace manual workflows. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I identified a need for better tracking and built Python and Power BI automation to ingest POS and CRM data, which eliminated repetitive data entry. This saved 8 hours per week and provided leadership with a 'single source of truth' for reporting. Ultimately, I know that the MIS / Executive Operations Analyst role at Kneetoes would allow me to bring my advanced Excel and data modeling skills to your inventory tracking and sales reporting processes. Additionally, my background as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my ability to work independently. I regularly managed multiple tasks to translate complex technical findings into business recommendations for stakeholders. This ability to act as a self-starter allowed me to identify high-value customer segments that led to a 300% increase in revenue. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my problem-solving skills in working on organizational workflows at Kneetoes. I know that my data-driven mindset and technical proficiency align with what it takes to succeed at the MIS / Executive Operations Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
